source_policy.activation_bias: free, open-source, low-hassle, production-scalable, reversible first

classification_model.swirm: overlapping functional class used for routing tools, agents, automations, assets and integrations
classification_model.inter_swirm_team: temporary collaboration among swirms to execute a command, product build, launch, proof, deployment, support workflow, or scale operation

seal_levels.SEAL_2: authenticated internal action, low external impact
seal_levels.SEAL_4: external communication, publishing, payment, token, proof, identity, or irreversible change
seal_levels.SEAL_5: regulated, custody, legal, medical, security-critical, or human safety impact

core_swirms.label: Intelligence
core_swirms.function: LLM reasoning, multimodal analysis, planning, coding, classification, synthesis

core_swirms.label: Agentic Runtime
core_swirms.function: agents, teams, planners, command routers, tool execution

core_swirms.label: MCP / Tool Context
core_swirms.function: standardized model-to-tool access through gateway and allowlisted servers

core_swirms.label: Memory / Continuum
core_swirms.function: long-term memory, vector recall, graph memory, user and agent continuity

core_swirms.label: Data / Schema / Storage
core_swirms.function: databases, schemas, storage, warehouse, APIs, events

core_swirms.label: Automation / Workflow
core_swirms.function: event routing, scheduled jobs, workers, webhooks, low-code orchestration

core_swirms.label: Identity / Web9
core_swirms.function: auth, RBAC, DID, VC, wallet, naming, access control

core_swirms.label: Proof / Ledger / Audit
core_swirms.function: evidence, attestations, audit trails, carbon proof, certificates, provenance

core_swirms.label: Blockchain / Web3 / Tokenization
core_swirms.function: chains, wallets, smart contracts, tokenization, fractionalization

core_swirms.label: Communication / Support / Call Center
core_swirms.function: email, SMS, WhatsApp, chat, voice, video, call center and notifications

core_swirms.label: Developer / GitHub / CI-CD
core_swirms.function: repos, issues, code generation, testing, releases, SDKs

core_swirms.label: Cloud / Runtime / Hosting
core_swirms.function: frontend, backend, serverless, containers, queues, workers, edge

core_swirms.label: Security / Governance / Secrets
core_swirms.function: secrets, policies, scanning, observability, audit, RBAC, incident response

core_swirms.label: CRM / Ops / Sales
core_swirms.function: leads, partners, deals, support queues, customer success, execution boards

core_swirms.label: No-Code / Low-Code / White Label
core_swirms.function: rapid apps, portals, dashboards, admin tools, white-label packaging

core_swirms.label: Analytics / BI / Observability
core_swirms.function: metrics, dashboards, logs, traces, product analytics, reporting

core_swirms.label: Hardware / IoT / Edge
core_swirms.function: sensors, QR/NFC, edge nodes, devices, environmental monitors

production_opportunities.name: OpenAI Platform
production_opportunities.access_method: Server-side API key, SDK, Apps SDK gateway
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Paid usage; enforce spend caps, model allowlist and evals.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Core intelligence route through provider router; external actions require policy gate.

production_opportunities.name: Anthropic Claude API + MCP ecosystem
production_opportunities.access_method: Server-side API key via model router
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add behind provider router with prompt-injection filters and cost caps.

production_opportunities.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio / Vertex AI
production_opportunities.access_method: API key or Google Cloud service account
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: AI Studio is low-hassle for dev; Vertex bills in production.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for multimodal and Google-side tasks through provider abstraction.

production_opportunities.name: OpenRouter
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Some free/low-cost models; production needs allowlist/spend caps.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate as experimentation and fallback lane, not sole source of truth.

production_opportunities.name: ABBA MCP Gateway
production_opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted gateway with allowlist, per-tool identity, command budget, audit log
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Build internal gateway first; no arbitrary STDIO, shell, file, git, browser, or network tools without sandbox.

production_opportunities.name: LangGraph
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for stateful Swirm teams and deterministic agent workflows.

production_opportunities.name: CrewAI
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: MIT/open-source core; enterprise/managed options may bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox for Swirm team prototypes; production only after evals and resource limits.

production_opportunities.name: Microsoft AutoGen
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for research and agent benchmark lane.

production_opportunities.name: Microsoft Semantic Kernel
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use when Microsoft/Azure enterprise path is needed.

production_opportunities.name: OpenClaw
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Evaluate in isolated lab only; do not connect production accounts until permission scopes are proven.

production_opportunities.name: LlamaIndex
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Carbon Actual knowledge and proof-linked retrieval.

production_opportunities.name: Haystack / deepset
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for alternative RAG lane and benchmarking.

production_opportunities.name: Zep Memory
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Cloud/OSS options; verify current limits before production.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as memory candidate; compare with pgvector/Graphiti.

production_opportunities.name: Graphiti
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox for Continuum memory graph.

production_opportunities.name: Qdrant
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: OSS self-host free; cloud free tier may vary.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as primary vector store if Supabase pgvector limits are reached.

production_opportunities.name: Supabase Postgres + pgvector
production_opportunities.access_method: Project URL, service role key, anon key, Postgres connection
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier for early build; production Pro/usage billing likely.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as core data/auth/storage route; enforce RLS, migrations, backups.

production_opportunities.name: Neon Serverless Postgres
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier available; production usage bills.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for branch-based dev/test databases or Supabase fallback.

production_opportunities.name: MongoDB Atlas
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free cluster option commonly available; production tiers bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use only for document-heavy workloads that do not belong in Postgres.

production_opportunities.name: Upstash Redis
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier available; production usage caps required.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for queues, locks, cooldowns and rate limits.

production_opportunities.name: n8n
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted community path; cloud plans bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep core automation but isolate credentials, disable untrusted agent inputs, require human approval for external actions.

production_opportunities.name: Activepieces
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; cloud may bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox as alternative/backup automation engine.

production_opportunities.name: Windmill
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for code-first internal automations and scheduled jobs.

production_opportunities.name: Temporal
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for mission-critical durable workflows after MVP.

production_opportunities.name: GitHub Platform
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free for many public/open-source workflows; paid runners/private limits may apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as core developer route; enforce branch protection and secret scanning.

production_opportunities.name: Vercel
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Hobby/free for experiments; production may require Pro.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as primary web deployment route with preview-to-production promotion.

production_opportunities.name: Cloudflare Workers / Pages / R2 / D1
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for edge APIs, DNS, CDN, queues and low-cost runtime.

production_opportunities.name: Keycloak
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Web9 identity backbone if Supabase/Auth0 becomes insufficient.

production_opportunities.name: ZITADEL
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/community options; cloud pricing may apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Evaluate as lower-maintenance identity alternative to Keycloak.

production_opportunities.name: Authentik
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Evaluate for internal admin SSO and proxy protection.

production_opportunities.name: W3C DID / Verifiable Credentials
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Design first; issue no live credentials until legal/security policy is complete.

production_opportunities.name: SpruceID / DIDKit
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox for Carbon Actual credentials and wallet login proof.

production_opportunities.name: ENS / Handshake Naming
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: ENS registrations and gas cost money; HNS market costs vary.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Reserve names manually; automate lookups only until approval gates exist.

production_opportunities.name: Ethereum / Base / Polygon
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Public testnets free except faucets; mainnet costs gas.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Start with read-only and testnets; no mainnet mint/transfer without explicit human seal.

production_opportunities.name: Hyperledger FireFly / Fabric
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for serious carbon/proof consortium pilots, not early MVP.

production_opportunities.name: thirdweb
production_opportunities.access_method: API key / client ID / wallet signer
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/dev tiers may exist; contract/gas costs apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for sandbox token/proof flows; production minting requires legal and human seal.

production_opportunities.name: Safe
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: App use low-cost; transactions cost gas.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for any treasury/token custody; never direct single-key production wallet.

production_opportunities.name: Stripe
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: No monthly fee for basic usage; transaction fees apply.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for payments only after legal entity/account setup and human approval gates.

production_opportunities.name: Resend
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier commonly available; production requires domain/DNS setup.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for internal/system emails first; external sends require approval/policy.

production_opportunities.name: Twilio
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use after consent and compliance flows; no outbound campaigns without approval.

production_opportunities.name: WhatsApp Cloud API / Meta
production_opportunities.access_method: Meta app token + webhook verify token
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for opted-in support workflows; avoid general-purpose AI chatbot distribution unless policy permits.

production_opportunities.name: Telegram Bot API
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for owner/admin notifications and approvals.

production_opportunities.name: Discord Developer Platform
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for community/support channels with moderation and command allowlist.

production_opportunities.name: Slack API
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free workspaces limited; paid plans common.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for ops approvals and internal Swirm collaboration.

production_opportunities.name: CALL-E
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Plan only; require explicit call consent rule and call logging.

production_opportunities.name: Twenty CRM
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as preferred OSS CRM candidate.

production_opportunities.name: Odoo
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Community edition self-host; enterprise apps bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use if Carbon Actual needs ERP depth beyond CRM.

production_opportunities.name: ERPNext / Frappe
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Evaluate for full operating system backend.

production_opportunities.name: Baserow
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for lightweight registry/admin tables.

production_opportunities.name: NocoDB
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as internal admin UI over Postgres/Supabase.

production_opportunities.name: Appsmith
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for owner dashboards and internal tools.

production_opportunities.name: ToolJet
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Alternative to Appsmith; benchmark before standardizing.

production_opportunities.name: Base44
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Pricing/access may vary; verify per project.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for rapid prototypes, then harden/export or rebuild critical systems.

production_opportunities.name: Lovable
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for app shells and demos; production code must be reviewed.

production_opportunities.name: Canva Developer Platform
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free user tools; developer/platform pricing varies.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for launch kits and brand-safe asset generation.

production_opportunities.name: Figma API
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free seats limited; paid teams likely.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for design system and product handoff.

production_opportunities.name: PostHog
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/product tiers available; self-host possible with ops cost.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as primary product analytics and feature flags.

production_opportunities.name: Metabase
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for owner dashboards and Carbon proof reporting.

production_opportunities.name: OpenObserve
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for logs/traces if Sentry alone is not enough.

production_opportunities.name: Sentry
production_opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/developer tier available; production may bill.
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use immediately for app errors and release health.

production_opportunities.name: Infisical
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use to centralize secrets; never expose values in chat/repo.

production_opportunities.name: HashiCorp Vault
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use when secrets complexity exceeds Infisical.

production_opportunities.name: Trivy
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add to CI for every deployable repo.

production_opportunities.name: Wazuh
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use later for production security monitoring.

production_opportunities.name: Raspberry Pi / Edge IoT
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Carbon Actual proof-of-presence/field-data pilots with signed device events.

production_opportunities.name: Eclipse Mosquitto / MQTT
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as device event bus with TLS and per-device credentials.

production_opportunities.name: OpenAlternative Registry
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as candidate-discovery source, not auto-activation source.

production_opportunities.name: Awesome Selfhosted
production_opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Ingest into candidate registry and score by license, maintenance, security.

inter_swirm_teams.label: Launch an app
inter_swirm_teams.default_activation_path: Prototype in Lovable/Base44/Appsmith, move source to GitHub, deploy Vercel/Cloudflare, data in Supabase, analytics PostHog/Sentry, secrets Infisical.

inter_swirm_teams.label: Carbon proof and attestation
inter_swirm_teams.default_activation_path: Collect signed field events, store in Supabase/Postgres, hash evidence, issue internal proof first, then blockchain/testnet only after human SEAL.

inter_swirm_teams.label: AI support and call center
inter_swirm_teams.default_activation_path: Route inbound email/chat to CRM, draft responses with AI, require human approval for sends/calls, log outcomes to analytics.

inter_swirm_teams.label: Autonomous operations
inter_swirm_teams.default_activation_path: Only allow agents to operate via gateway, scoped tokens, approval gates, audit logs, task budgets, and kill switch.

risk_controls: No raw API secrets in chat, issues, commits, logs, or generated files.
All production actions go through ABBA gateway with route-level SEAL policy.
MCP/tools are sandboxed, allowlisted, identity-scoped, logged, and budgeted.
External sending, phone calls, payments, token minting, and identity credentials require human approval.
Automations triggered by comments, emails, social messages, or tickets must treat input as untrusted.
Production connectors require least-privilege scopes, secret rotation, retry limits, dead-letter queues, and audit logs.
Every integration receives status: discovered, candidate, registry_ready, sandboxed, configured, connected, pilot_active, production_active, paused, blocked, retired.
next_run_search_targets: official MCP registry/server security posture and maintained server list
current OpenAI Apps SDK and ChatGPT connector production requirements
Meta WhatsApp Business policy updates affecting AI support bots
free-tier changes for Supabase, Cloudflare, Vercel, OpenRouter, PostHog
DID/VC production verifier services and EUDI wallet bridge options
